completed_tasks: Implemented native media library GET/DELETE routes and Studio hydration/copy/delete actions on branch feat/native-grok-imagine-video.
Implemented model-control updates: Nano Banana 2 2K removed/rejected, Nano Banana Pro keeps 1K/2K, native Codex GPT Image 2 size helper/prompt guidance added.

Fixed fake blank image success regression: server no longer fake-completes unavailable native image providers, and ImageStudio rejects native completed responses without a usable same-origin asset URL.
Fixed historical prompt regression: library responses now expose prompt while redacting private provider/runtime fields, so prompt display/copy works for server-hydrated entries.
Fixed broken historical video localStorage issue by pruning stale server-backed native video entries after successful server hydration.
Fixed fake MP4 placeholder issue by replacing the malformed fake MP4 stub with a playable stub containing moov metadata.
Fixed Vertex/Nano Banana ADC regression: trusted gateway GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS now reaches Vertex image/video workers, and child-env credential paths are redacted from failure detail.
Fixed native media root drift: default NATIVE_MEDIA_ROOT is now repo-local /home/k8r1m/Open-Generative-AI/.native-media instead of process.cwd()/.native-media; explicit NATIVE_MEDIA_ROOT still wins.

Added root AGENTS.md with durable project rules to preserve existing native media paths, avoid fake provider successes, preserve Vertex ADC env, and share/merge .native-media stores across clones/worktrees/forks.
Updated docs/state/native-media-library-delete-copy-tests.md with current state, runtime, verification, known open scheduler test issue, and merge/new-branch rules.
Added docs/plans/native-media-regression-fix-plan.md and docs/plans/native-video-last-frame-download-plan.md; README references were updated.
Backed up feature branch earlier to origin/feat/native-grok-imagine-video at commit 364ecae before later uncommitted regression/root fixes. Current additional fixes are still uncommitted.

key_decisions_and_rationale: Defaulting native media root to repo-relative .native-media was chosen over process.cwd() because cwd drift caused empty-library risk across branch/startup contexts. Explicit NATIVE_MEDIA_ROOT still exists for shared stores across separate clones/worktrees.
Provider-specific live gates were chosen over global fake/live selection because enabling Grok live must not make Vertex/Codex image requests fake-complete as blank successful assets.
Client-side rejection of completed native image responses without same-origin asset URLs was added as a second guard, not a substitute for the server fix.
Prompt is no longer private in library responses because prompt display/copy is an explicit user-facing library feature; provider internals remain redacted.
Vertex ADC is forwarded from the trusted gateway process rather than browser/client input. Credential values/paths remain denied from request bodies, argv, public jobs, and failure detail.
The app was restarted only when Karim asked or when necessary to load approved fixes; current instruction is not to restart while testing continues.
Full native sweep failure in scheduler idempotency was recorded but not patched because Karim asked not to change anything else until after testing.
issues_discovered: Bad hosted test instance previously used fake provider path and returned blank successful image assets for native Nano Banana/Codex. Fixed and reviewed.
Historical prompts were missing because prompt was listed as a private job field. Fixed and reviewed.
Some historical videos were stale localStorage/server-backed entries or fake MP4s without playable moov metadata. Server hydration/pruning and MP4 stub fixed.

Vertex/Nano Banana auth broke after restart because GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS was present but NATIVE_MEDIA_ALLOW_GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS was absent, causing the child env to strip ADC. Runtime workaround and code fix applied/reviewed.
Reviewer found ADC path could leak into provider failure detail when supplied via child env. Fixed with child-env redaction tests and approved.
Full native sweep still fails at tests/nativeSchedulerRecovery.test.js:101: duplicate clientRequestId idempotency lookup happens after validating changed duplicate inputs. Unresolved by request.
Current branch contains uncommitted fixes beyond pushed commit 364ecae. Do not assume origin branch includes all current work until committed/pushed.
